archetype: 5 (Jewel & Luxury) - Light variant with Jewel Accents
design_philosophy: A minimalist, lovely, and elegant Muslim wedding invitation. Blending cream/ivory base aesthetics with deep maroon and gold jewel accents for contrast. The experience focuses on a soft envelope reveal, beautiful typography, and clear event details, optimized heavily for mobile devices.

fonts.purpose: Primary elegant headings (Event names, Location titles)
Couple names (Hanna & Niyas) to provide an ornamental, romantic script feel
Clean, highly readable body text, dates, times, and small labels

hierarchy.h1_script: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-['Great_Vibes'] tracking-normal text-[#7A1B28]
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-['Cormorant_Garamond'] tracking-wide text-[#C5A059]
hierarchy.label: text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.2em] font-['Montserrat'] text-[#C5A059]

buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#C5A059] text-[#C5A059] hover:bg-[#C5A059] hover:text-white

layout_spacing.borders: rounded-none or very subtle rounded-sm (elegant, not bubbly)

envelope_reveal.animation: Framer Motion slide-up or scale-up fade out of the 'envelope flap' revealing the hero content beneath. Duration 1.2s, ease: [0.76, 0, 0.24, 1].

scroll_reveal.animation: Staggered fade-up for text elements as they enter viewport using Framer Motion (initial opacity 0, y: 20 -> animate opacity 1, y: 0). Duration 0.8s.

motion_and_interactions.smooth_scroll: Lenis library must be used to give a premium, weighty scroll feel.

components_instructions.EnvelopeOverlay: A fixed z-50 full-screen component. Cream background with a gold border. A central button/seal saying 'Tap to Open'. On click, animates away to reveal the site.
components_instructions.HeroSection: Cream background. Features Bismillah in Arabic, Couple Names in Script, and a live countdown to Nikkah (May 10, 2026).
components_instructions.NikkahDetails: Cream background, elegant gold border container. Nikkah details: Sunday, May 10, 2026, 12:00 noon, Century Staples Convention Centre, Erattupetta.
components_instructions.ReceptionDetails: Maroon background (`bg-[#7A1B28]`) to contrast the Nikkah. Gold text. Details: Monday, May 11, 2026, 7:00 PM onwards, Nehru Memorial Town Hall, Mattanchery.
components_instructions.FamilySection: Cream background. Minimalist list of parents' names.
components_instructions.ActionButtons: Add to Calendar and Open in Maps buttons. Use lucide-react icons (MapPin, Calendar). Style: secondary outline for cream bg, solid gold for maroon bg.

images.description: Subtle cream paper texture, can be used as a very low opacity background mix-blend-multiply.
Rich red velvet texture, use in the Reception section background with low opacity overlay to give depth.
Gold Islamic geometric pattern. Can be used as a subtle border element or background detail with very low opacity.

critical_rules: NO standard Shadcn UI generic cards. Build elegant custom HTML/Tailwind structures with 1px gold borders and generous padding.
ALWAYS use `data-testid` on buttons and interactive elements.
DO NOT use Inter or standard sans fonts for headings. Stick to Great Vibes, Cormorant Garamond, and Montserrat.
Make sure contrast is high enough: Gold on Cream might be light, use a darker shade of gold (#B8860B or #996515) for text if needed for APCA contrast.
Text Bismillah 'بسم الله الرحمن الرحيم' must be rendered as raw text with 'font-amiri' instead of an image for crisp resolution.
